manner: Carries the habits of a place-bound worker whose judgment comes from repetition rather than theory. daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of hostler in and around Verdant Alchemy, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Verdant Alchemy workable through the obligations of hostler while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Transpolity.
hidden_pressure: Must keep their piece of the world working while larger systems push stress downward. Around Verdant Alchemy, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of hostler visibly slip.
